prompt_text:
### Demographics: 46-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 3 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Nausea and reduced appetite over the last 1-2 months after starting injections.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Major Depressive Disorder
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~7.5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Liraglutide 1.8mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 73.5 kg; Height 169.8 cm; BMI 25.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 138/74 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.2%; 9 months ago 8.9%; 6 months ago 8.4%; 3 months ago 7.9%; current 6.7%), FPG (12 months ago 226mg/dL; 9 months ago 248mg/dL; 6 months ago 219mg/dL; 3 months ago 214mg/dL; current 145mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 71.7kg; 9 months ago 75.3kg; 6 months ago 72.2kg; 3 months ago 75.7kg; current 73.5kg), Height (12 months ago 169.8cm; 9 months ago 169.8cm; 6 months ago 169.8cm; 3 months ago 169.8cm; current 169.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 26.0kg/m²; current 25.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 133mmHg; 9 months ago 136mmHg; 6 months ago 135mmHg; 3 months ago 139mmHg; current 138mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 74mmHg; 9 months ago 74mmHg; 6 months ago 72mmHg; 3 months ago 72mmHg; current 74mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 9U/L; 9 months ago 15U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 9.0U/L; current 13U/L), AST (12 months ago 20U/L; 9 months ago 27U/L; 6 months ago 19U/L; 3 months ago 28U/L; current 23U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.4mg/dL; current 0.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 13mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 9.0mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 7.8mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 6.0mL/min/1.73m²; current 7mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 470mg/g; 9 months ago 593mg/g; 6 months ago 434mg/g; 3 months ago 402mg/g; current 518mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 84mg/dL; 9 months ago 83mg/dL; 6 months ago 84mg/dL; 3 months ago 78mg/dL; current 81mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 46mg/dL; 9 months ago 45mg/dL; 6 months ago 49mg/dL; 3 months ago 49mg/dL; current 47mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 160mg/dL; 9 months ago 163mg/dL; 6 months ago 161mg/dL; 3 months ago 163mg/dL; current 170mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 11.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
